observation.messy_prompt:

HR: operator O2 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J100 due day 3 high priority; J106 due day 3 high priority; J117 due day 4 med priority.

mapping_profile.name: pick-pack / outbound wave

task_coverage.reason: local Taskset/LocalRuntime run has no deployed HUD taskset_id; rewards/traces are real, but platform task coverage requires hud sync/deployed tasksets

job_source.summary: Imported 259 SOAR order lines across 132 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-2 (pick-pack / outbound wave): 133 source zones, 6 stations, 3 route constraints, 3 job families, layout pressure 0.51.

intake.scenario_note: Imported 259 SOAR order lines across 132 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-2 (pick-pack / outbound wave): 133 source zones, 6 stations, 3 route constraints, 3 job families, layout pressure 0.51.
